title: West Africa's cocaine connection
content: Cocaine production and use are at record levels worldwide. West Africa has become a major transit hub, where traffickers exploit weak states, under-resourced enforcement and high-level corruption.
snippet: Cocaine production and use are at record levels worldwide. West Africa has become a major transit hub, where traffickers exploit weak states, under-resourced enforcement and high-level corruption.
creator: Tangi Bihan & Keïsha Corantin

title: The Russiagate fiasco
content: In 2016 Christopher Steele, a former MI6 operative who had moved into business intelligence, compiled a now notorious dossier alleging collusion between Donald Trump, then a US presidential candidate, and the Kremlin. Its claims proved unfounded.
snippet: In 2016 Christopher Steele, a former MI6 operative who had moved into business intelligence, compiled a now notorious dossier alleging collusion between Donald Trump, then a US presidential candidate,
creator: Vadim Nikitin

title: School for spies
content: The Diploma in Intelligence and Global Threats (DiReM) course at Sciences Po Saint-Germain-en-Laye – known as the ‘Malotru Diploma' or ‘School for Spies' – sets out to train the next generation of French intelligence agents.

title: When it comes to China, America has a plan
content: AI competition with China is driving the United States' new fusion of military power, industrial planning and private capital. Countries are lining up behind the US strategy.
snippet: AI competition with China is driving the United States' new fusion of military power, industrial planning and private capital. Countries are lining up behind the US strategy.
creator: Evgeny Morozov

title: Memory battles
content: In the name of Polish-Soviet friendship, the postwar communist regimes long preferred to keep quiet about the ethnic cleansing that led to the disappearance of the Polish and Ukrainian minorities living on either side of their shared border.
snippet: In the name of Polish-Soviet friendship, the postwar communist regimes long preferred to keep quiet about the ethnic cleansing that led to the disappearance of the Polish and Ukrainian minorities
creator: Catherine Gousseff

title: Poland and Ukraine's painful shared history
content: Once a patchwork of peoples, the borderlands of Poland and Ukraine grew increasingly tense before the second world war. The war brought mass displacements that transformed their ethnic makeup.
snippet: Once a patchwork of peoples, the borderlands of Poland and Ukraine grew increasingly tense before the second world war. The war brought mass displacements that transformed their ethnic makeup.
creator: Catherine Gousseff

title: Colombia's incomplete transformation
content: Gustavo Petro, Colombia's first leftwing president, promised reform after decades of violence and inequality. Will his successor, to be sworn in this August, continue his programme or seek to reverse it?

creator: Maurice Lemoine

title: Tel Aviv puts pressure on Slovenia
content: After Viktor Orbán's defeat in Hungary, Tel Aviv lost its staunchest ally in the EU. It may have found a replacement in Slovenia's new rightwing government.
snippet: After Viktor Orbán's defeat in Hungary, Tel Aviv lost its staunchest ally in the EU. It may have found a replacement in Slovenia's new rightwing government.
creator: Lily Lynch

title: Gaza sharpens divide between French Jews
content: Anti-Zionism is a minority position among France's Jewish population, but since the assault on Gaza began, it's grown. For some, resisting the conflation of Jewishness with Israel has become imperative.
snippet: Anti-Zionism is a minority position among France's Jewish population, but since the assault on Gaza began, it's grown. For some, resisting the conflation of Jewishness with Israel has become
creator: Laura Raim

title: Pro-Israel lobbying deepens its ties in Europe
content: ELNET, a pro-Israel lobbying network, presents itself as fostering dialogue but has shifted significantly to the right since its creation in 2007. Nowhere is its influence clearer than in Germany.
snippet: ELNET, a pro-Israel lobbying network, presents itself as fostering dialogue but has shifted significantly to the right since its creation in 2007. Nowhere is its influence clearer than in Germany.
creator: Yossi Bartal

title: Jordan's war on the Muslim Brothers
content: Long tolerated as a stabilising force, the Jordanian Muslim Brotherhood's capacity to mobilise support has prompted the regime to outlaw it.
snippet: Long tolerated as a stabilising force, the Jordanian Muslim Brotherhood's capacity to mobilise support has prompted the regime to outlaw it.
creator: Clémentine Mariuzzo

title: Mali's crisis plays to Algeria's advantage
content: Initially welcomed, Mali's 2020 coup has created deepening insecurity: with ongoing jihadist insurgency in the north and the capital encircled, the balance of power across the Sahel is shifting.
snippet: Initially welcomed, Mali's 2020 coup has created deepening insecurity: with ongoing jihadist insurgency in the north and the capital encircled, the balance of power across the Sahel is shifting.
creator: Akram Belkaïd & Anne-Cécile Robert

title: UK: end of the road for two-party politics
content: In July 2024 Keir Starmer promised to clean up British politics. Last month voters delivered an unsparing verdict.
snippet: In July 2024 Keir Starmer promised to clean up British politics. Last month voters delivered an unsparing verdict.
creator: Jamie Maxwell

title: When sanctions stop working
content: Having accused five Chinese refineries of buying Iranian oil, the US Treasury on 24 April put them on its ever-growing list of sanctioned companies. On the face of it, routine enough. For decades Washington has asserted the right to decide who can trade with the rest of the world, and everyone else has acquiesced to its diktats for fear of being shut out of an international financial system tethered to the dollar. But this time it didn't go according to plan. Beijing, which had previously (…)
